violations.text: The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
Inspector observed heavy leaf litter accumulation around establishment and refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The hand-washing sinks near the 3 bay sink and bathroom were lacking paper towels. PIC added paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as hotdogs) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash, cardboard, equipment, and other debris. Area to be maintained clean. PIC cleaned up area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The walls and ceiling in the back storage area is in poor repair (observed holes). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
